sections.name: Kinematics of motion in a straight line

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Force components and resultants
skills.description: Resolve coplanar forces into components and find resultant magnitude and direction.
common_errors: Resolving with sine and cosine interchanged
Not preserving direction signs
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.1
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Equilibrium of particles under coplanar forces
skills.description: Apply zero resultant force conditions to particles held in equilibrium.
common_errors: Assuming equal tensions without evidence
Ignoring weight direction
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.1
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Friction and limiting equilibrium
skills.description: Use F <= mu R and limiting-friction conditions on rough horizontal or inclined surfaces.
common_errors: Using F = mu R when friction is not limiting
Taking the normal reaction as mg on an inclined plane
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.1
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.section: 4.2 Kinematics of motion in a straight line
skills.name: Constant acceleration kinematics
skills.description: Use constant-acceleration formulae for one-dimensional and vertical motion.
common_errors: Using the wrong sign for acceleration due to gravity
Mixing distance and displacement
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.2
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.section: 4.2 Kinematics of motion in a straight line
skills.name: Motion graphs
skills.description: Interpret velocity-time and displacement-time graphs, including gradients and areas.
common_errors: Treating graph height as distance instead of velocity
Missing negative areas below the axis
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.2
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.section: 4.2 Kinematics of motion in a straight line
skills.name: Variable acceleration by calculus
skills.description: Use calculus relationships between displacement, velocity and acceleration for variable motion.
common_errors: Omitting constants after integration
Confusing v = ds/dt and a = dv/dt
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.2
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Momentum, impulse and direct collisions
skills.description: Use conservation of momentum and impulse in direct collisions and impact problems.
common_errors: Not assigning a consistent positive direction
Assuming kinetic energy is conserved
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.3
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Newton's second law for a single particle
skills.description: Apply F = ma to a particle with resolved forces, weight, normal reaction and resistance.
common_errors: Omitting resistance from the force balance
Using kg as a force unit
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.4
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Connected particles, strings and pulleys
skills.description: Model connected particles with common acceleration and tensions in light strings or rods.
common_errors: Assigning different accelerations to a taut string system
Getting tension direction wrong on one body
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.4
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Dynamics on inclined and rough planes
skills.description: Apply Newton's laws to particles moving on smooth or rough inclined planes.
common_errors: Resolving weight in the wrong direction
Using friction in the wrong direction
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.4
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Work-energy and kinetic/potential energy
skills.description: Use work-energy principles with kinetic energy, gravitational potential energy and work done.
common_errors: Using mass instead of weight in potential energy
Forgetting energy lost or gained by work done
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.5
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Power, resistance and driving force
skills.description: Use P = Fv and work-rate relationships for vehicles, engines and resistance forces.
common_errors: Forgetting to convert kW to W
Using total force rather than driving force in P = Fv
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.5
skills.notes: Machine-expanded candidate skill from official syllabus section; requires subject expert review.

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Work-energy with resistance and friction
skills.description: Apply energy methods where non-conservative resistance or friction does work.
common_errors: Using friction as positive work when it opposes motion
Omitting vertical height change
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Mechanics, section 4.5
